column1: WILD PROTOCOL  |  3-MONTH CAMPAIGN OVERVIEW  |  Mar 17 - Jun 14, 2026
Phase One Launch  |  Biohacker + Spiritual Dual Funnel  |  Goal: 30,000 email subscribers by Week 12

column6: Biohacker Focus
Science of WILD: REM architecture, circadian prep, hypnagogic transition basics. Position WILD as a zero-cost neuro-hack.
column9: Ancient wisdom meets modern sleep science. Dreams as consciousness training ground. Introduce hypnagogia as spiritual threshold.
column12: Build trust, establish authority, drive first 1,000 email opt-ins. No hard selling.

column6: Advanced techniques: WBTB, galantamine stack, EEG headbands, performance tracking. Social proof from protocol results.
column9: Dream symbolism, shadow work, lucid dreaming traditions (Tibetan, Sufi, Taoist). Community sharing and journaling.
column12: Scale list to 5,000+. Launch Tier 1 course. Open Discord + Telegram communities.

column6: Performance integration: mental rehearsal protocols, problem-solving sessions, hardware integration guide. Tier 2 launch.
column9: Retreats, advanced practices, mentorship. Community guides emerge. Annual virtual retreat announced.
column12: Reach 10,000-30,000 subscribers. Convert community. Launch Tier 2. Introduce Tier 3 waitlist.
